description_long: This storage box is a multi-tiered, rectangular structure with three stacked sections, each separated by thick, flat horizontal panels. The exterior is a light beige or cream color, with each section featuring a prominent square marking with an 'X' pattern, resembling a crate or cargo box. The middle and bottom tiers are wider, while the top tier is smaller and sits centrally above the others, creating a stepped appearance. The surfaces are smooth and appear to be made of wood or a wood-like material, with no visible handles or locks. The box is solid and robust, likely designed for stacking or storing items in an organized manner. Its design suggests it could be used in garages, warehouses, or urban storage areas.
description: A multi-tiered, cream-colored storage box with square 'X' markings, smooth surfaces, and a stepped, stackable design. Appears robust and suitable for organized storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the three stacked sections with the 'X' marking centered on each visible face, highlighting the stepped design.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the width of the bottom two tiers and the central placement of the smaller top tier, with 'X' markings on each section.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with the same stepped structure and prominent 'X' marking on each section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stepped profile and the 'X' markings on the side panels.
